nl_prompt: Which product categories have more than 10 percent return rate?
gold_sql: SELECT p.category, ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(CASE WHEN o.status='returned' THEN 1 END) / COUNT(*), 2) as return_rate FROM orders o JOIN products p ON o.product_id = p.id GROUP BY p.category HAVING ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(CASE WHEN o.status='returned' THEN 1 END) / COUNT(*), 2) > 10
